overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the hooded protagonist exploring a historic Middle Eastern city during golden hour. The character walks through sandy streets lined with mud-brick buildings, crosses a stone bridge over a canal, passes a horse-drawn cart, and descends to a shaded waterfront path.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic town street with mud-brick buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the town street toward a stone bridge

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green robes walking past the character

entered.detail: tan-colored mud-brick structures with wooden balconies and lattice windows
green canvas canopy extending from a building providing shade
two-story stone building with prominent arched entryways on the ground floor
strings of lanterns suspended across the street on wooden poles

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit historic town street lined with mud-brick buildings. A prominent stone building with arched entryways stands ahead, while green fabric awnings provide shade on the left. Sparse pedestrians move through the sandy street as the character approaches a bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge crossing over water canal

events.description: character stops at bridge railing to look down at the water canal below

agents.ego_description: walking across the bridge and pausing to observe the water view from the railing

notable_agents.action: child in simple clothing walking ahead of the character across the bridge

entered.detail: low stone wall with decorative cutouts running along the bridge edge
calm waterway running beneath the bridge with reflections of buildings
tall date palms visible beyond the bridge railing

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a stone bridge over a canal, with low stone railings on both sides. At mid-bridge, the character stops to look down at the water. A child walks ahead while palm trees and distant buildings frame the view. The enclosed bridge space contrasts with the open street behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge exit plaza with view of domed mosque

events.description: horse-drawn cart loaded with goods passes by from behind
character turns left at the end of the bridge onto a waterfront path

agents.ego_description: continuing across the bridge, passing a horse cart, and turning left at the plaza exit

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn cart with driver moving past the character

entered.detail: large building with distinctive turquoise dome and minaret visible in the distance
open paved area at the bridge exit with scattered pedestrians

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge into a sunlit plaza, the character passes a horse-drawn cart and turns left. A magnificent blue-domed mosque rises in the distance to the left, while the water canal now runs alongside the path. The open space allows full view of the golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront terrace with stairs descending to canal level

events.description: character descends stone stairs to the lower waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated terrace and descending stone stairs to the lower waterfront level

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading down from the terrace to the water level
stone balustrade with geometric cutout patterns along the terrace edge
wooden bench placed against the terrace wall overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: Walking along a waterfront terrace with the sun creating a warm backlight, the character approaches stone stairs. The water canal is now adjacent on the right. The character descends the stairs to a lower path, passing decorative lattice railings and a wooden bench.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded waterfront walkway with overhead canopy

agents.ego_description: walking along the quiet waterfront path under the shade of a green canopy

entered.detail: large green fabric shade stretched overhead between buildings
decorative wooden screen with climbing vines attached to the building
terracotta pots with red flowering plants placed along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a secluded waterfront path shaded by an overhead green fabric canopy. Dense vegetation including flowering plants in terracotta pots and climbing vines on wooden lattice fences line the right side. The water canal remains visible to the left as the path continues forward in dappled shade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit historic town that gradually transitions from open sandy streets to a secluded, shaded waterfront path. It begins with the character walking past mud-brick buildings and green fabric awnings toward a prominent stone structure, before moving onto a stone bridge where the view narrows over a flowing canal. As the character exits the bridge into a wide, sun-drenched plaza, the scene opens up to reveal a magnificent blue-domed mosque under a golden hour sky while passing a horse-drawn cart. The camera then follows the character along a backlit waterfront terrace and down a set of stone stairs, shifting from the bright open air to a lower level. Finally, the environment transforms into a quiet, dappled sanctuary as the character walks beneath a green fabric canopy lined with terracotta pots and climbing vines.
